parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": "{{ $json.user_id }}",
  "reward_type": "{{ $json.engagement_action }}",
  "special_bonus": true,
  "points": {{ $json.event_type === 'streak.achieved' ? ($json.engagement_data.streak_length >= 30 ? 500 : $json.engagement_data.streak_length >= 14 ? 200 : 100) : 50 }},
  "exclusive_content": {{ $json.engagement_data.streak_length >= 30 || $json.engagement_data.inactivity_days >= 14 }},
  "reason": "{{ $json.engagement_action === 'celebrate_streak' ? 'Outstanding consistency and dedication!' : 'Welcome back bonus for returning to your art journey!' }}"
}
